titleStmt.title: SII 10.771: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 771. (A.R. No. 303 of 1922.) ON A HUGE ROCK TO THE EAST OF THE ISUKANUTIPALLI TANK, BASINIKOṆḌA, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. Ś. 1614. (Prajōtpatti)

summary.p: Registers the terms offered to certain persons for repairing the irrigation tank at Baśvinakoṇḍa which had breached.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kākitaprati
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka
varṣaṁbbulu 1614 Agu nēṭi prajōtpattisaṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 3 lu daru
baṁddige hajarattu sāhēbulavāri kāryakarta layina rāja śrīnarasōcaṁdarsu
paṁttulu havāludāru paragaṇē madaḷapalligāru baśinikoṁḍḍalō cellē yisaka
nūtipalle bōyanāyakulu pikili tirumalaya kuṁnnimaḍgu A
ppaya gaṁdhaṁ bālaya modali nānānāyakulku yiccina cervukaṭṭu kavulu
baśvinakoṁḍḍacervu tegipōyi vuṁḍagānu Adi kaṭṭiṁccē nimityaṁ mīku kavulu yiccina
vivaraṁ yīsaṁvatsarānamīru cervukaṭṭiṁccina tarvātanu reṁḍḍuphalālu saripālu dasavaṁ
daṁ kaṭṭiṁcinavārki pālu nagariki pālu yīcoppuna reṁḍḍu phalālu naḍapaṁgalavāraṁ Āta
rvātanu sāgē phalaṁlōnu yallapaṭkinni nagariki mūḍupāḷlu kaṭiṁccina dastuvaṁdakulku
pālu lekhanu tarvāta naḍapaṁgalavāraṁ pipiyātyamānyaṁ vubhaya
tu ya maddinaḍapaṁgalavāraṁ yāmaryādanu Ācervu phala parucukuni
mīputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ Ācyāṁdrārkasthāyigā Anubhaviṁccukuni sukhāna
bratikēdi brāhmalu syūdṟlu tappirāyanā kāśilō brāhatyācēśina pāpāna bō
duru turukavāru tappitē paṁddimāvasānaku Āśiṁccina pāpāna pōduru yiṭlani vrā
śi yiccina kavulū ṁōṅḥūḷ ḍYṇāṣṭY ŌF ḍēḷḥī
Digital edition of SII 10.771 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
